feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to send emails from Quality Notification Action Box
entry.content:
Dear all,

I am trying to trigger the sending of an email after selecting a task from the Action Box of a Quality Notification.

In particular, one of the tasks configured in the Action Box is "Send mail to supplier".

In the on-premise version of SAP S/4 Hana, when you define an activity in its customizing node, there is a field where you can associate the Function Module to trigger the sending of the mail when you select that specific task.

In SAP S/4 Hana Public Cloud, that field is missing.

Therefore I ask you kindly how I can make sure that, following the selection of the task "Send mail to supplier", in the system screen the pop-up for sending an email opens.

Thank you all.

entry.title: #COE#HHT how to put Special Character Tab to Constant field of payment file?
entry.content:
In “Map Format Data for Incoming Files from Banks”, we can use the following special characters:

  • {EMPTY} for empty character
  • {SPACE} for blank space character
  • {ENTER} for newline character

In “Map Format Data for Payment”, we want to use Tab as a Constant, how can I put it to Constant field below?

entry.title: S/4 HANA trial on GCP with 90-day, $300 Free Trial offer
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

is it possible to use the S/4 HANA 30-day free trial in combination with the 90-day, $300 Free trial offer on GCP? While setting up the system, I received the following error: 

 
Usage limits reached: Regional: - Quota 'SSD_TOTAL_GB' exceeded. Available: 500, Requested: 964 To solve this problem you have to request any additional quota from the Quotas page in the GCP console.
More Information
GCP Documentation
 
Additional Quota on the other hand cannot be acquired with the 90-day, $300 Free Trial offer:
 

 

 
Has anyone found a way to use both trials (S/4 HANA and GCP) combined and if so how?

entry.title: Extending app "Stock - multiple materials"
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have a requirement to extend "stock - multiple materials", I was going through the app documentation, I have seen custom fields and logic available for this app in help documents as below.

App Extensibility: Stock - Multiple Materials | SAP Help Portal 

But I can't find them in my system. Attaching screenshot for reference.

I can't find business context: Stock - Multiple Materials in custom logic app and Master Data: Batch in custom field app.

Let me know if anyone faces similar issue.

Regards,

Jagadhatri

ABAP Extensibility #MM-FIO-IM-SGM

entry.content:
How can we delete the Unused Master Data in SAP S/4HANA PUBLIC CLOUD ?

entry.title: How to enable the Custom field in Mass changes to Purchase Requisition App
entry.content:
Hi SAP team,


Hi have created a custom field and enable all related CDS view /Services, but still the custom field which i created is not available in mass changes to purchase requisition App.


Could you please confirm whether it's doable or not ,to extend the custom field in Mass changes to purchase requisition app.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Need Ability to Apply Different User Statuses to Multiple WBS Elements Simultaneously in SAP
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am currently facing a limitation where user statuses can only be added to project briefs and are applied generally across the entire project structure. This restricts the flexibility to assign different user statuses to individual WBS elements within the same project.

In production lines, especially for tank manufacturing, having specific statuses for different activities is crucial for efficient project control. For example, in a tank production line, two tasks like bending sheet metal and welding can occur simultaneously, but each task requires a different user status to track its progress accurately.

Is there a way to configure SAP to allow different user statuses to be applied to multiple WBS elements simultaneously, based on the specific needs of each element?

Any insights or recommendations would be greatly appreciated!

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Best Practices for Renumbering Accounts in YCOA and Chart of Accounts Management
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am looking for guidance on best practices for managing the chart of accounts, specifically regarding renumbering the necessary accounts.

Is the YCOA (Uniform Chart of Accounts) the mandatory operational plan, or is it possible to implement renumbering as needed? If renumbering is allowed, are there any specific strategies or recommended practices to follow in order to avoid disruptions in financial reporting and integration with other modules?

I would appreciate any advice or experiences on how to best approach this process.

Thanks in advance!

Bea

entry.title: Request for Custom Field Editing in 'Create Billing Documents - F0798' Application in Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

We have encountered a recurring demand from our customers in Portugal for the ability to utilize multiple sales billing series (interval ranges) to accommodate invoicing customers for dates in the past. While this is relatively straightforward to implement in 'On-Premise' or 'Private Cloud' environments through the creation of custom billing document types, we have found it challenging in the 'Public Cloud.'

To work around this limitation, we created a custom field and custom logic using the Custom Field and Logic application, making it editable in the VF01 header data. We also implemented flexible numbering for billing documents. However, we still face challenges when attempting to achieve similar functionality through the 'Create Billing Documents - F0798' app, as it does not allow any data entry in the fields.

Is there any possibility of enabling custom fields to be editable/input in the F0798 application? This would greatly enhance our ability to meet customer needs.

Any insights or solutions would be greatly appreciated!

Thank you!

Bea

entry.title: S/4 Hana Cloud: Creating roles in BP master data for supplier
entry.content:
When creating a BP master data for our supplier, there are two roles: purchasing supplier and financial supplier.

If the supplier is a software organization or an organization who provides service (non-physical products), is it necessary for us to create purchasing supplier role information for this supplier?

entry.title: Finding Tax Rate for Custom CDS View
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I need to create a report for supplier invoices, and there are some fields relating to tax information such as tax code, tax date, etc. However, while creating my Custom CDS View, I cannot find the field tax rate or tax percentage in the Data Source I_SupplierInvoiceAPI01. I have tried looking for other data sources such as I_TaxCode or I_OperationalAccountingTaxItem but there seems to be no results at all.

Is it possible to get the field from other data sources, or it is not possible?

entry.title: S/4Hana Cloud: Difference between "Central Purchasing Block" and "Purchasing Block"
entry.content:
Hi,

Can someone explain to me what's the difference between

"Central Purchasing Block" and "Purchasing Block" under BP's purchasing organization view?
 
Thanks

entry.content:
How to enable approve/reject button in email notification?

entry.title: #COE#BUMA CDS views are not elegible as data source in "Custom CDS Views" app.
entry.content:
Hi SAP,

"We require the CDS (I_MaintOrderTechObjCube) associated with the maintenance order, but it doesn't show up in the list of available data sources when creating a custom CDS. The required data source only appears when we change its recommended status from 'Yes' to 'No.' We attempted to use it as a data source but received a warning indicating that this CDS should not be utilized as a modeling data source. Can we proceed on using this as External API?

Regards!

entry.title: Public Cloud ))) No default value maintained for op. generation for order type ybm1
entry.content:
SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Manufacturing 

 

Hello, I'm leaving a question because there is an error that I can't solve while practicing SAP PUBLIC CLOUD Manufacturing.

Error during conversion from planned order to production order.

When I searched for the co831 error, they told me to go into OPJG or SPRO. But as you know, there is no T-CODE like that in PUBLIC CLOUD. On a lighter note, I know only ca010203, cs010203, cr010203, co010203 

 

For your information, the picture below is DEFECT VALUE and only DISPLAY MODE was possible. 

Please let me know how I can apply ORDER TYPE YBM1 to my material (FERT_BDS_단팥빵).

Thank you for reading.

entry.title: Transport from Q system to P system
entry.content:
We needs to perform transfer from Q system to P system. Will this influence our production system working right now. We have basic IC working right now in production. or can you advice how to proceed partial transfer? Or is it possible to reverse advanced IC and wait for this to function properly. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Credit segment field issue in API
entry.content:
1. The API BusinessPartnerSUITEBulkReplicateRequest_In it is not having credit segment field in it.
  2. What is the API for credit management master data maintenance?

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: automatic replenishment task exceeding maximum qty of bin
entry.content:
Hello SAP World,

we are replenishing at bin level using automatic replenishment. We have activated replenishment for storage type. we have maintained fixed bin assignment with min and max qty at bin level.

Testing: once pick task is created and confirmed. if stock level is less than min qty,  replenishment task is getting created automatically.  But the task is getting created for full max qty. it is not calculating qty to meet the max qty.

Eg: min qty:5 pc , max qty:10 pc

stock available:2 pc

replenishment task created: 10 pc.

But it should have been created for 8 pc.

Please recommend solution.
